summary: Completed comprehensive testing of admin panel features for 'Propiedades Turísticas RD' real estate website. All backend CRUD APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend admin panel fully functional with all tabs, forms, and dialogs working correctly. Homepage and properties page integration with dynamic locations confirmed working.

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby warnings in console for DialogContent components

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (200 OK)
Agency settings GET/PUT operations (200 OK)
Locations CRUD operations - Create, Read, Update, Delete (200 OK)
Properties CRUD operations - Create, Read, Update, Delete (200 OK)
Contact messages CRUD operations (200 OK)
File upload endpoint validation (correctly rejects non-image files)
Admin page loads at /admin with all 4 tabs (Configuración, Ubicaciones, Propiedades, Mensajes)
Settings tab shows agency configuration form with logo upload button
Agency name input field populated with 'Propiedades Turísticas RD'
Logo upload button and save settings button present and functional
Locations tab shows 8+ provinces with edit/delete buttons
Add Location button opens dialog and successfully creates new location
Location creation dialog with name input and save functionality working
Properties tab shows 6+ properties with images, prices, and edit/delete buttons
Add Property button opens comprehensive dialog with all fields
Property creation uses dynamic locations from database (dropdown populated)
Property form includes title, price, location, type, description, amenities fields
Messages tab displays contact messages correctly
Homepage search bar loads with dynamic locations from database
Location filter dropdown shows all 11 locations (8 original + test locations)
Search functionality on homepage working correctly
Properties page navigation and display working

success_percentage.backend: 100% (23/23 API endpoints and CRUD operations working)
success_percentage.frontend: 95% (All major functionality working, minor console warnings only)
